title: The Eerie Fog
description: The Eerie Fog - The thick fog surrounds you - "Did that move", "Was is always there", "I think I heard something" - the feeling of not being alone...
body:
# The Eerie Fog
This datapack changes the way you play survival, making it closer to alpha or beta, where you cannot just sprint through night and mobs being a threat. And that thick fog, watching you, always, giving you that feeling, of not being alone...

![The Fog, is always watching...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d277d1404d38e271e4df04c6f0d90b9b4ea579e.png)
### Description
Overhauls the survival, to be more **difficult**, and **slower** that it is today. Reducing number of **structures**, removing certain **drops** from mobs, removing **sprint** mechanic and **hunger** - making it more like in pre-Beta 1.8 but making it more **balanced**. 

These things above? These are just an introduction to a **creepy**, and **lonely** atmosphere. Completly alone, with **no npcs**, and just **animals** and **monsters**. Check out changelogs for more informations!

### Additional information
- This datapack goes best with **_Optifine_** mod, as it changes the **lightmap** and gives light source **dynamic** option.

- Take your time playing this game; it takes **days** for the events to finally unfold, enabling you to **fully** **immerse** yourself in that world.
  
- **Multiplayer** is available, but can cause some **bugs**, as it's not 100% tested.

### How to setup
1. Install Resource pack (The Eerie Fog Resource pack), that is located with the Datapack.
2. Create new world (This Datapack works best with a brand new world) -> More -> Datapacks 
        -> Open Datapack Folder -> Paste The Eerie Fog Datapack
3. PLAY!

### Links
